name: Forum Energy Technologies, Inc.
description: Forum Energy Technologies, Inc. is a global company that designs, manufactures, and distributes technologies and equipment for the oil, natural gas, industrial, and renewable energy industries. The company's products include highly engineered capital equipment as well as products that are consumed in the drilling, well construction, production, and active services of oil and natural gas wells. Forum Energy Technologies operates through three main segments: Drilling & Downhole, Completions, and Production & Infrastructure, serving customers worldwide.
